Alabama.meta: EIA 2024 actuals. Generation: EIA-923 annual net generation by state (annual_generation_state.xls). Consumption: EIA-861 retail sales + direct-use estimate. Battery: EIA-860 reported nameplate. Source: eia.gov/electricity/state/alabama

Alaska.meta: EIA 2024 actuals + 2025/2026 trend projections. Generation actuals: EIA-923 annual net generation by state (annual_generation_state.xls). Consumption actuals: EIA-861 bundled retail sales (Sales_Ult_Cust_2024.xlsx). Projections: linear trend fit on 2019-2024 generation totals; consumption follows that annual growth ratio. Sources: eia.gov/electricity/data/state and eia.gov/electricity/state/alaska
Alaska.projectionMethod: Linear trend fit using 2019-2024 annual state totals

Arizona.meta: EIA 2024 actuals + 2025/2026 trend projections. Generation actuals: EIA-923 annual net generation by state (annual_generation_state.xls). Sources: eia.gov/electricity/data/state and eia.gov/electricity/state/arizona
Arizona.projectionMethod: Linear trend fit using 2019-2024 annual state totals

Arkansas.projectionMethod: Linear trend fit using 2019-2024 annual state totals

Maine.projectionMethod: Linear trend fit using 2019-2024 annual state totals (assumed 1% annual growth)
